title: delphinium austriacum subsp. stiriacum
intro: Delphinium austriacum subsp. stiriacum, also known as Austrian Delphinium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Delphinium. It is a perennial plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Austrian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Delphinium austriacum subsp. stiriacum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
